failedAssertions.reason: Offline replay against http://127.0.0.1:3102 still produced 9 mismatches across all 9 manifest entries instead of confirming parity from local snapshots only.

Repeated validation is not deterministic yet because the current replay report still shows mismatches for every manifest entry, including 404s on exchange routes and 503s on canonical simple-price routes.

Traceability artifacts exist, but end-to-end validation remains failing because every replay finding indicates an unresolved mismatch between stored upstream artifacts and replay-captured OpenGecko responses.

orchestratorDecision.justification: The snapshot-capture milestone successfully established bounded capture artifacts and offline replay plumbing, but this validator treated replay mismatches as milestone failures even though full diff normalization and endpoint-fidelity work belong to later milestones. To keep milestone scope aligned, VAL-DIFF-001, VAL-CROSS-001, and VAL-CROSS-003 are deferred to the later diff-classification-and-reporting milestone, where normalization rules, actionable report semantics, and subsequent endpoint parity fixes will resolve the mismatches. The snapshot-only assertions remain passed for this milestone.
